isolation.notes: Used fresh temporary project directories for each assertion, sourced secrets.env without echoing values for API-mode checks, and did not stage, commit, or edit tracked repository files.

assertions.reason: API-mode indexing succeeded against a fresh temporary project at /tmp/vera-val-inst-004-abb9g_pk after sourcing secrets.env.

assertions.reason: Without embedding env vars, vera index failed and the error named the missing embedding variables while suggesting --local as the alternative path.
evidence:
Command observation: Error: embedding API not configured: EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL not set
Hint: set EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL, EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID, and EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY environment variables, or use --local for local inference.

assertions.reason: crates/vera-core/Cargo.toml configures ort with default-features = false and load-dynamic, and API-mode indexing still succeeded with ORT_DYLIB_PATH set to the nonexistent path /tmp/vera-val-inst-012-uxbfbgtj/nonexistent-onnxruntime.so.
